function.name: view
function.description: View file contents with line numbers. This tool is for FILES ONLY - do NOT use it on folders/directories (use 'ls' for directories instead). Supports single file or multiple files. Max 600 lines per file - use ranges for large files. For multiple files, use 'paths' parameter instead of 'path'.

path.description: Path to a single file to view

paths.description: Array of file paths (strings) or objects with path and optional ranges. Use this to read multiple files in one call.

ranges.description: Line ranges for single file mode, e.g. ['1-50', '100-150']. Use to read specific sections of large files.
